seo.title: Awesome Video — 1946+ Curated Video Tools, Codecs & Streaming Resources
seo.desc: Discover 1946+ curated video development resources — codecs, players, encoders, and streaming tools — across 9 categories on Awesome Video.

seo.title: whep-to-whip — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Proxies WebRTC offer/answer negotiation between a WHEP source and WHIP sink, establishing a direct media path after handshake.

seo.title: Video Encoding Tools & Codecs (AV1, HEVC, H.264) — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Browse 336 curated video encoding tools and codec resources — FFmpeg, AV1, HEVC/H.265, H.264, and VP9 encoders for developers on Awesome Video.

seo.title: Learning Journeys — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Guided multi-step learning paths for video development — from beginner streaming to advanced encoding pipelines.

seo.title: About — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Learn about Awesome Video — the web home of the awesome-video curated list by Nick Krzemienski — and awesome-list-site, the open-source platform that powers it.

seo.title: AI-Powered Recommendations — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Personalized video development resource recommendations based on your interests and learning goals.

seo.title: Submit a Resource — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Suggest a new video development tool, library, article, or course for inclusion in Awesome Video.

seo.title: Sign In — Awesome Video
seo.desc: Sign in to Awesome Video to save bookmarks, submit resources, and personalize your learning journey.
